questionHtml: State two characteristics of a perfectly competitive market.
markschemeHtml:
Award [1] for each valid characteristic.

Characteristics may include:

  • many small firms
  • homogeneous product
  • no barriers to entry (and exit)
  • perfect information
  • perfect factor mobility
  • firms are price takers.
